text_value: 2026 Class 1 employer SSC reference points: Category B employer contribution EUR 22.94/week (or 10% of the basic weekly wage if employee opts for alternative contribution); Category C employer contribution 10% of the basic weekly wage; Category D employer contribution capped at EUR 49.04/week.
notes: Official payroll burden reference. Preserve category-specific treatment by wage band and worker classification in later payroll logic.
benchmark_band_note: Employer SSC is wage-band dependent; 10% mid-band logic with capped upper band.
benchmark_use_case: Use as statutory employer payroll burden input.
comparator_note: Official statutory source; no market comparator needed.
fit_for_modeling_note: Ready for modeling, but payroll logic should preserve category-specific treatment.
